goal: The daemon actively tracks Claude Code version changes and provides actionable schema drift analysis across versions

truths: claude-history version-check shows version history with timestamps, session counts, and new_fields_count
GET /v1/schema/versions returns version timeline with optional diff=true for per-version field diffs
GET /v1/schema/drift returns overflow fields grouped by version then record type with promotion status and occurrence counts
Version changes detected during ingestion are persisted to version_history table and fire SseEvent::VersionChanged
Compact summary messages are classified via is_compact_summary column and excluded from analytical views by default
All 7 analytical views filter out compact summary messages for accurate counts

artifacts.provides: version_history table, messages columns (is_compact_summary, source_tool_use_id, extra_json), schema_drift_log occurrence_count column, 7 recreated views
Compact summary field extraction, extra_json population on messages
INSERT ON CONFLICT with occurrence_count increment
Enhanced version_history_enhanced(), drift_by_version(), drift promotion status
Version persistence to version_history table on version change
Enhanced versions and drift handlers with grouping and promotion status
Enhanced run_version_check and run_schema_drift with richer output

plans.name: Migration 006: version_history table, messages columns, drift enhancement, view recreation

tasks.name: Create migration 006 SQL
tasks.description: version_history table, messages ALTER TABLE (is_compact_summary, source_tool_use_id, extra_json), schema_drift_log ALTER TABLE (occurrence_count, last_seen_at), backfills, and 7 view recreations with is_compact_summary filtering

tasks.name: Register migration 006 in schema.rs and add tests
tasks.description: Add 006 to MIGRATIONS array, add tests for version_history table existence, messages columns, view queryability

plans.name: Decomposer compact summary extraction and drift occurrence tracking

tasks.name: Update drift.rs log_overflow to track occurrence counts
tasks.description: Change INSERT OR IGNORE to INSERT ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE SET occurrence_count = occurrence_count + 1, last_seen_at = datetime('now')

tasks.name: Update decompose_user and decompose_assistant for compact summary fields and extra_json
tasks.description: Extract isCompactSummary, sourceToolUseID from overflow HashMap, populate is_compact_summary and source_tool_use_id columns, serialize remaining overflow to extra_json on messages

plans.name: Watcher version persistence and enhanced query layer

tasks.name: Add version_history persistence to check_version_change in watcher.rs
tasks.description: After SSE event emission, INSERT INTO version_history ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE for real-time persistence. Also backfill on startup from sessions table.

tasks.name: Add enhanced query functions: version_history_enhanced, drift_by_version, promotion status
tasks.description: New query functions reading from version_history table with session_count and new_fields_count, drift grouped by version then record_type with dynamic promotion status computation

plans.name: API handlers and CLI enhancement for version monitoring

tasks.name: Enhance /v1/schema/versions and /v1/schema/drift API handlers
tasks.description: Update versions handler to use version_history_enhanced with optional ?diff=true. Update drift handler to use drift_by_version with promotion status grouping.

tasks.name: Enhance run_version_check and run_schema_drift CLI output
tasks.description: Version-check output adds session_count and new_fields_count columns. Schema-drift output adds promotion status and occurrence count. Both direct and daemon modes.

patterns.name: Normalized table design
patterns.description: 13+ normalized tables with clear separation of concerns

patterns.name: Embedded migrations via include_str!
patterns.description: MIGRATIONS const array with include_str! macro

patterns.name: INSERT OR IGNORE idempotency
patterns.description: Idempotent decomposition with INSERT OR IGNORE or INSERT ON CONFLICT

patterns.name: 5-step decompose pattern
patterns.description: upsert session, insert message, decompose content, upsert agent, log overflow

patterns.name: Schema drift logging
patterns.description: log_overflow with qualified record_type names and UNIQUE deduplication
